meaning: n.以弗所(古希腊小亚细亚西岸的一重要贸易城市)
examples: To the angel of the church in Ephesus.
Ephesus was actually on the Turkish shore of the Aegean Sea, which featured spectacular Roman engineering, especially plumbing.
The trip also included a three-day cruise of the Greek Islands (highly overrated), plus Rhodes, and Ephesus (not overrated).
